result.stdout:
dotnet-xbdd

Creates a new test project initialized for xBDD

Usage: dotnet xbdd [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  project       Provides access to project level commands.
  solution      Provides access to solution level commands.

Run 'dotnet xbdd [command] --help' for more information about a command.

Provides access to project level commands.

Usage: dotnet xbdd project [options] [command]

Options:

Run 'project [command] --help' for more information about a command.

Generates code for a test project in the current folder.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  mstest        Creates an MSTest project that uses xBDD.
  xunit         Creates an MSTest project that uses xBDD.

Run 'generate [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Creates an MSTest project that uses xBDD.

Usage: dotnet xbdd project generate mstest [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                         Show help information
  -tn|--testrun-name                   Sets the default test run name in the xBDDConfig.json file.
  -rfan|--remove-from-capability-name  Sets the default test run name in the xBDDConfig.json file.

Provides access to solution level commands.

Usage: dotnet xbdd solution [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  generate      Generates code for a test project in the current folder.
  summarize     Creates an HTML Summary report for the JSON test run reports specified.

Run 'solution [command] --help' for more information about a command.
